subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received. Its contents were detailed in meaning, and its themes were elaborate in their causes [3.5s]... ...In reality, Hamadan, nay rather all Persia has found infinite capability. Therefore all the friends most unloosen
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مضمون معانی مفصل بود... از مدرسه تایید توصیف نموده
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unchastity and adultery, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty
